summary: Test suite demonstrates good TDD discipline with comprehensive unit tests covering all three retention policies (max-age, keep-latest-N, max-total-size) and their combinations. The harness.test.ts provides thorough end-to-end validation via act with exact value assertions on output. However, rigor is limited by missing edge cases: no explicit boundary-condition tests (e.g., artifacts exactly at maxAgeDays cutoff), no negative/invalid value handling, no tests for parseArgs function or CLI error paths (missing --input, invalid --now). Design is clean with good fixture helpers and independent tests, but workflow YAML parsing lacks error handling and assumes file structure. The act integration tests are well-structured with mustContain/mustNotContain assertions, but only cover happy paths. Would reliably catch regressions in core retention logic but might miss CLI edge cases and error handling paths.
